messages.preview: Looks like most of the grant systems suggested are currently closed… however there is an ideal one with puk, we would just need a uni or nhs
Forgot to ask re crowdfunding mate. Got July 7 in diary. Is that still on?
Hi! just coming up for air. I have calls so planning to be at home so that would work fine Xx

lead.headline: A key team departure requires immediate attention.
